transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation Line. What symptoms are you experiencing today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, um, I've had this chest pain since this morning, and I'm kind of short of breath too.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see. On a scale of one to ten, how would you rate the discomfort?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe a six or seven. It comes and goes, but the shortness of breath is new for me.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, thank you for sharing that. Have you had any fever, cough, or recent travel that might explain this?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No fever, no cough. I did skip my blood pressure medicine yesterday, the lisinopril.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. Missing a dose can sometimes cause mild symptoms like that. I'd recommend taking your next dose as scheduled and monitoring how you feel over the next day.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, that's good to know. Should I still come in for an appointment, or just wait it out?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can schedule you a routine follow-up with your primary care provider, Dr. Alvarez, sometime next week to review your medication schedule.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, next week works. Maybe Tuesday afternoon if possible?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Tuesday at 2:15 PM is available. I've booked that for you and added a note about your missed dose.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, thank you so much for your help today.
